title: Cascade raises $3.5M to help construction firms find and win projects | TechCrunch
summary: Cascade , a startup building a platform to help architecture, engineering, and construction firms find and win projects, has raised a $3.5 million seed round from Andreessen Horowitz Speedrun, Ada Ventures, and Snowball VC.
